text_original: its a good game you can do a lot with it be a hero a villan anything ... the ai responds isnt that perfect yet lagging more memory of conversations ect. but over all nice to kill time
text_zh: 这是一款不错的游戏，你可以用它做很多事情，成为英雄、反派或者任何角色……AI的回应还不完美，存在延迟，对话记忆等方面还有不足。但总体来说，还是适合用来打发时间。
reply_original: Thanks for your feedback! We're glad you enjoy the game. We're actively optimizing AI memory and response speed. If you encounter specific issues like lag or forgotten chats, please share details via support@fantachat.ai. Your input helps us improve!
reply_zh: 感谢您的反馈！很高兴您喜欢这款游戏。我们正在积极优化AI的记忆和响应速度。如果您遇到卡顿、忘记聊天记录等具体问题，请通过support@fantachat.ai提供详细信息。您的反馈帮助我们不断改进！
